/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bench_latency.dir/bench_latency.cpp.o -o bench_latency  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/anaconda3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib /opt/anaconda3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.dylib /opt/anaconda3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.dylib
